stemHtml:
Which interpretation of this D-ATIS is correct?

WSSS ARR ATIS F 0130 METAR Exp ILS Apch segregated PARL Ops in use ARR RWY 02L DEP 02C...

options.a: RWY 02L for departures; visibility 10 km+; wind 010° at 4 kt.
options.b: ATIS for departing and arriving traffic; RWY 02C for departures; no significant change expected.
options.c: ATIS F current; temperature 26°C; no significant weather change expected.
options.d: The ATIS is for arriving aircraft only, with CB clouds at 1300 ft base, and runway 02L for arrivals.
